summary: Crypto markets remain buoyant with BTC pushing toward $80K amid US-Iran ceasefire optimism and ETF inflows, while commodities like gold and crude oil outperform amid geopolitical tensions and stagflation risks. Equities hit highs led by AI semis, but DeFi exploits and macro uncertainties temper altcoin enthusiasm. Sentiment leans bullish overall with focus on BTC resilience and commodity strength.
